description: Instagram comment sentiment rules for Glorify (devotional app) and NFC (Christian smart ring). Edit this file to update classification rules without changing code.

priority.note: When a comment contains both positive and negative signals, classify as negative.
priority.example: The design is gorgeous but the quality is terrible and it broke in a week. → negative

positive.core: The reviewer expresses satisfaction or positive emotion toward the product or service.

categories.name: Product
signals: Product quality praise: beautiful, stunning, high quality, solid, well-made, exactly as pictured
Design/appearance praise: love the design, looks exactly like I hoped
Wear experience: fits perfectly, comfortable to wear

categories.name: Religious / faith meaning
signals: Ring has faith significance: great reminder of my faith, love the cross/scripture engraving, means a lot to me as a Christian
Gift accepted in religious context: perfect baptism gift, she loved it for her confirmation

categories.name: Shopping experience
signals: Fast delivery / packaging: arrived quickly, beautifully packaged
Good customer service: customer service was amazing, they fixed my issue right away

categories.name: Recommendation intent
signals: Clear recommend or repurchase: highly recommend, will buy again, 5 stars

examples: Praise God! This ring is beautiful! → positive (faith + product praise)
I love this app, it helps my daily prayer habit. → positive

negative.core: The reviewer expresses dissatisfaction, disappointment, or a complaint about the product or service.

categories.name: Product quality
signals: Damaged or poor workmanship: broke after a week, tarnished quickly, cheap looking, scratched
Not as described: not as pictured, much smaller than expected, color is completely different

categories.name: Order / logistics
signals: Wrong item: wrong size/style sent
Shipping problems: never arrived, took forever, damaged in shipping

categories.name: Returns / service
signals: Poor support: no response, refused to refund, terrible customer service
Difficult refund or exchange process

categories.name: Poor value
signals: Not worth the price: not worth the money, overpriced for the quality

categories.name: Negative emotion words
signals: disappointed, awful, terrible, regret, waste of money, do NOT buy

examples: Amen. But the ring broke after 2 days. → negative (faith + product complaint)
The design is gorgeous but the quality is terrible and it broke in a week. → negative

neutral.core: No substantive product/service evaluation, or purely factual/descriptive content.

categories.name: Pure religious expression (brand-specific — important)
signals: Standalone faith phrases: Praise God!, Amen!, God bless!, Hallelujah!, Thank you Jesus!
To God be the glory
Bible verse quote only, with no product opinion
Amen / faith phrase + emojis only
Emoji-only comments (❤️, 🙏, 🙌)
Repetitive faith affirmations without product opinion: Amen Amen, Amen y Amen
categories.note: Religious words alone are NOT positive. If faith expression includes product opinion, follow product opinion.

categories.name: Pure factual statements
signals: I ordered size 7 and received size 7
I saw this on Instagram

categories.name: Questions or inquiries
signals: Does this come in gold?
How does it work?
When will it be available?

categories.name: Vague / low-signal comments
signals: OK, Fine, It's a ring, Interesting, Wow, Hmm
CTA replies on social posts (e.g. Comment Mark for link → Mark)

categories.name: Devotional post engagement (Glorify)
signals: User replies Amen or emoji to a Bible verse / devotional caption — engaging with content, NOT reviewing the app → neutral unless they explicitly praise the app/product

faith_with_product_priority: Praise God! This ring is beautiful! → positive
Amen. But the ring broke after 2 days. → negative

project_types.description: faith/devotional app, prayer, Bible, church community, spiritual plans
NFC smart ring, NFC hardware, NFC tags, tap-to-connect features

output_notes.language: Primary language of the comment, written in English (e.g. English, Spanish, Portuguese)
output_notes.recommended_reply: Required for positive/negative only; empty string for neutral; same language as comment; Glorify tone warm/sincere; NFC tone helpful product support
